The '''Planetary Defender starfighter''', also known simply as the '''Planetary Fighter''' was one of the countless products of [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]].

==Characteristics==
Although the Planetary Starfighter was able to travel through space, it was not a space superiority fighter for military use. Rather, it was used for corporate security by customs forces. While the craft's roll was limited, it had excellent pitch, speed, and acceleration.

[[File:Dunelizard-recg.jpg|thumb|left|150px|A pair of [[G1-M4-C Dunelizard fighter]]s attacking a Planetary Defender starfighter.]]
The Planetary Fighter had dual forward [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and two launchers, each of which was armed with up to six [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]]. The craft was lightly shielded.

==History==
[[Tinoon Station]] at [[Tinoon/Legends|Tinoon]] used Planetary Fighters extensively.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:PlanetaryFighterConcept.jpg|thumb|left|Rejected concept art for the Planetary Fighter.]]
The Planetary Fighter was created by [[Totally Games]] for the [[1999]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''. The initial design was rejected by LucasArts as the engine was similar to designs for vessels in [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].<ref name="Rogue Leaders">''[[Rogue Leaders: The Story of LucasArts]]''</ref> A portion of the original design was realized in the game as the [[Pinook fighter]].

The Planetary Fighter was given the more specific name of "Planetary Defender starfighter" by a picture caption in the ''[[Rebellion Era Campaign Guide]]'' but that book provided no other information on the model.
